scenario_scope: Real local-project intake decision for the pinned Corben's Trainer training, evaluation, artifact, and promotion control-plane snapshot.

cases.decision_rationale: Typed experiment assets, trainer/backend separation, retained learning-evidence failures, and the distinction between stage completion and parameter-changing learning strengthen the existing evidence discipline and self-improvement boundaries.
required_before_drafting: trace the Best Model backend contract
map each learning-truth requirement to exact source and retained failure artifacts
separate backend declarations from independently verified effects
evidence_transition_preconditions: accepted transition required for any support-state change
promotion_blockers: real training effect and independent checkpoint-delta verification not reproduced
non_claims: does not establish model learning quality or production training reliability
does not treat a backend-authored truth Boolean as independent proof

cases.decision_rationale: Content-addressed blobs, role bindings, lineage edges, immutable journals, durable campaign state, backup recovery, and async checkpoint staging are concrete implementation references; discarded worker results, whole-file append rewrites, weak hash chains, and null promotion artifacts define the required failure closure.
required_before_drafting: test terminal acknowledgement for every checkpoint request
evidence_transition_preconditions: artifact identity and promotion role are exact
accepted transition required for any support-state change
promotion_blockers: checkpoint failures before the inner persistence branch may be unrecorded
queue idle is not checkpoint success
journal chain and compaction are not cryptographically anchored
non_claims: does not establish crash safety, tamper resistance, or complete replay
does not establish database referential integrity under all mutations

cases.decision_rationale: The snapshot supplies both strong interfaces—asset/rule/mode/claim separation, authenticity states, quarantine, intervals, and holdout watchdogs—and a concrete negative case where run-ID hashes count as seeds and later-quarantined placeholder evidence leaves stale claims and a stale promotion pointer.
required_before_drafting: cite exact code behavior and retained claim/quarantine states
word external-labelled results only as quarantined negative evidence
design transitive invalidation and real seed identity contracts
evidence_transition_preconditions: authentic benchmark provenance and official harness established
promotion_blockers: all retained typed run seeds are null
three external-looking promoted claims rely entirely on quarantined runs
candidate.current remains stale and lacks an artifact ID
non_claims: does not accept any retained external benchmark score
does not infer independent repetitions from filenames or run IDs

cases.decision_rationale: Dataset governance, real corpus digesting, resource profiles, and accelerator resolution are useful interfaces, while the ID-hash checksum, declaration-only overlap scan, constructed contamination fields, template-adjacent split, and absolute source paths show the difference between metadata completeness and verified provenance.
required_before_drafting: separate content digest, identifier fingerprint, declaration coverage, and empirical scan
map requested, resolved, and observed resource identities
evidence_transition_preconditions: preflight verifies the actual bytes consumed
sample-level overlap method and residual are recorded
split independence and resource receipts are claim-scoped
promotion_blockers: generic preflight does not verify content bytes
overlap scan does not inspect sample contents
validation split is not demonstrably source or generator disjoint
non_claims: does not establish decontamination, semantic diversity, or independent validation
does not establish accelerator comparability or efficiency

cases.decision_rationale: The trainer provides a coherent control-plane concept, but the mechanisms currently distribute cleanly across evidence, artifact, benchmark, supply-chain, self-improvement, resource, and governance chapters. The backend/kernel project and remaining intake must be mined before a distinct boundary can be justified.
evidence_transition_preconditions: support state remains unchanged without accepted evidence
promotion_blockers: concept substantially overlaps existing chapter owners
non_claims: does not add the proposed chapter
does not claim the local architecture is novel

validation_boundary: Records existing-chapter routes and a deferred epistemic-control-plane boundary. It does not validate training quality, external benchmark performance, decontamination, checkpoint durability, evaluator independence, publication rights, or a support-state transition.
non_claims: does not publish private source or artifact material
